overview: FitAI is a complete AI-powered gym fitness web app that generates personalized weekly diet and workout plans using Gemini AI. Track your BMI, daily workouts, water intake, and streaks — all with a premium dark glassmorphism UI.
features: AI-generated weekly diet & workout plans via Gemini
BMI calculator with health category and message
Daily check-in system with streak counter
Exercise library with voice narration (Web Speech API)
Weekly progress dashboard with Recharts charts
